problem id: 009a74b6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01110101 -> 00000111
  01101101 -> 10000110
  10001000 -> 01101110
  11101010 -> 00001110
  10100101 -> 00011011
  10001011 -> 00111110
  10101101 -> 10011010
  11101101 -> 10011110
  10110001 -> 11011011
  01100001 -> 11000111

query: 00110000
predicted answer: 11111011
